name: app-code enforcement is opt-in: without --include-app-code the full-stack rules do not fire (no regression)
command:
printf 'const x: any = 1;
' > a.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file a.ts 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'status=(green|advisory) ' e.txt && ! grep -q 'g-ts-001' e.txt && echo opt-in-default-unchanged 1>&2
